transcript.text:
I'm so mad right now
[Fan's submission through email and DMs]
No..!!
I never take supplement ads
Never
It's here
This has been around for months
It's a dietary supplement advertisement on Facebook and Instagram
They keep uploading it
There are so many comments on it too
Saying that my name is "Hayoon"
And I lost a lot of weight by using their products
And became "Tzuyang"
Getting like 100~200 million subscribers
They kept uploading these advertisements
I've had people ask me

"Is this true? Is this really you? Did you take their pills?"
"Did you take dietary supplements?"
It was brought to my attention
I will say it once and for all
Diety supplements,
Beauty cosmetics,
I will not participate in that
What if I travel out of country and they say "Hi Hayoon!"
Write it in Korean if you're going to do it
I didn't know what it said
And also,
Since we're talking about this already,
I've noticed a lot of restaurants that are advertising by using my name and photos
I thought it was fine at first because
it's true that I came by their restaurant
But still, they didn't get my permission to do that

Nor talked to me about it
Using my photo on their doors
You're not supposed to do that
I saw this on a blog that this one person went to the restaurant because of my photos
And said that "the quality of food and service was really bad and that they were very disappointed"
"Why is Tzuyang advertising this type of place?"
Stuff like that, you know?
But I never advertised their restaurant
Nor gave them permission to post my information on their restaurants
So I'm pretty saddened by that
But I'm telling you
If it's an ad, I will indicate that it's an ad!
I didn't know at first that you were supposed to indicate that it's an ad back when I first started streaming
So there are a couple of times I uploaded an ad without indicating it because I didn't know about it
But after I found out about it,
I've been writing it on the description box

There are also comments like "This is an ad" when it's really not an ad
So please don't get confused or misunderstood
If it's an ad, I will let you guys know it's an ad
To the owners: If you want to use my name or photo for your restaurant, please at least let me know
[Chat: Be bold and straight forward]
Illegal
Overthrow!
I'm a scary person when I'm mad
Don't do it
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
